header_label: Aula 9 — Eating Out: Restaurants & Dietary Needs
accordion_desc: Restaurants & Dietary Needs: ordering language + some/any
welcome:
Welcome back, Pricila!

Onboarding

You explored the city by metro and found a great restaurant. This week: how to read a menu, order a full meal, and explain any allergy or diet. Review these emergency phrases before class.

Could we see the menu, please?
I will have the fish, please.
Is there any nut in this dish?
I am allergic to nuts.
audit:
<!--
SCENARIO FIT — Aula 9
Can-do: "I can read a menu, order a full meal, and explain my dietary needs and allergies."
Gramatica-alvo: ordering language (I will have / I would like / Could we have...?), some/any (some em +, any em ?/-), dietary phrases (I am allergic to / I cannot eat / I am vegetarian).
Vocab-alvo: menu, starter, main course, dessert, waiter, allergy, vegetarian, bill.
Cenario escolhido: restaurante em Sydney (Pricila janta fora apos explorar a cidade; pede uma refeicao completa e lida com uma alergia e uma amiga vegetariana).
Por que elicita o alvo: pedir comida OBRIGA o aluno a usar ordering language, perguntar sobre ingredientes (Is there any...?), e explicar restricoes (allergic to / vegetarian). >70% dos itens-alvo (8 vocab + estruturas) sao naturalmente elicitados. Habitat natural do focoLinguistico.

CONTINUIDADE — Aula 9
Itens novos desta aula: menu, starter, main course, dessert, waiter, allergy, vegetarian, bill; ordering language + some/any + dietary phrases.
Itens revisados (de aulas anteriores): "How do I get to...?" e vocab de transporte (Aula 8); pedidos educados Could/Would (Aulas 6-7); "I would like" (Aula 7).
Callback no warm-up (slide 2): retoma ATIVAMENTE 2 itens da Aula 8 — (1) o aluno diz como chegou ("Take the... line and get off at...") e (2) usa "exit" para fazer a ponte: saiu do metro, achou o restaurante, e agora vai pedir o jantar.
NB: nenhum item-alvo novo repete vocabulario ja ensinado nas Aulas 1-8.
-->

challenges.prompt: Ask the waiter for the menu.
Order the fish as your main course.
challenges.answer: "For my main course, I will have the fish, please."

challenges.prompt: Ask if there are nuts in a dish.
challenges.answer: "Is there any nut in this dish?"

challenges.prompt: Explain you are allergic to nuts.
Ask for a meat-free option for your friend.
Ask for the bill at the end of the meal.
